arts.ttl: Eight moments that defined the Liverpool vs Man City rivalry
arts.sum: Liverpool face Manchester City this weekend in a fixture where the stakes have been high in recent seasons. The two teams have gone head-to-head for the biggest prizes across the last decade, in a rivalry that has increased in importance and hostility. Ahead of their latest clash at Anfield, we’ve remembered eight moments that have […] The post Eight moments that defined the Liverpool vs Man City rivalry first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals what he will be doing during Liverpool vs Man City as title warning sent
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has fired an Arsenal title warning ahead of Liverpool's Premier League clash with Manchester City at Anfield

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola to battle Real Madrid for 'homesick' Kevin De Bruyne replacement?
arts.sum: Manchester City and Real Madrid reportedly show an interest in signing Al-Ahli midfielder Gabri Veiga, a former highly-rated La Liga product.

arts.ttl: Phil Foden names highest quality fixture in Premier League history
arts.sum: Foden was speaking ahead of his side’s top-of-the-table clash with Liverpool this weekend

arts.ttl: Talks have started: Arsenal & Liverpool among clubs battling to sign 20-year-old gem
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are reportedly among the clubs showing an interest in the potential transfer of Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens. The talented 20-year-old has shone in the Bundesliga, following in the footsteps of other young English talents Jadon Sancho and Jude Bellingham, who’ve previously moved to Dortmund at a young age. arts.ttl: West Ham 2-5 Arsenal: Mikel Arteta's men equal 87-year-old Man City goalscoring record
arts.sum: Arsenal equal an English football goalscoring record last achieved by Manchester City in 1937 with their 5-2 Premier League drubbing of London rivals West Ham United.

arts.ttl: Slot: Liverpool want to show we can compete with Man City
arts.sum: The fortunes of Liverpool and Manchester City couldn't be further apart at this moment in time.

arts.ttl: Pep opens up: Man City need this losing period, it's time to suffer!
arts.sum: For probably the first time in his managerial career, Pep Guardiola is a manager under pressure.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Manchester City simulated to predict huge Premier League title clash
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Manchester City at Anfield on Sunday afternoon, so we simulated the title clash to predict the outcome.

arts.ttl: Liverpool must seize their moment vs Man City - it's their best chance to win title
arts.sum: Liverpool can open up an 11-point lead over Manchester City in the title race if they beat them on Sunday and history shows they must grab it
